programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in another parent at her kids' school, Michael, who loses his wife at the same time. Stars Lacey Chabert and Warren Christie.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office, where a group of quirky characters led by Oliver try to deliver the undeliverable. Stars Eric Mabius and Kristin Booth. SSD Movie #1.

programme.title: Love, Of Course
programme.desc: When widowed mother Amy moves her daughter Cara to her college dorm, Amy finds herself searching for the next step. While at the university, Amy gets an offer she can't refuse and meets Noah and discovers a new life of her own.

programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, Benjamin's brother Jake is stunned to learn he is expected to marry Leah to carry on the name. Jake suggests to Leah that they get married and maintain a secretly platonic relationship.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: Radio host Lacey is hosting a bachelor bakeoff to raise money to save the radio station. When her star bachelor backs out, she enlists visiting businessman Zac to fill the spot.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Truly, Madly, Sweetly
programme.desc: When Natalie and Eric each inherit a share of an old bakery, this unlikely pair must decide what's in store for this historic landmark. When both of their careers come to a screeching halt, an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job, Allie accepts a temp job as governess to Princess Theodora. A spark forms between Allie and Theodora's father Maximillion, the King of Winshire.

programme.title: Love in Design
programme.desc: In need of a shakeup on her home-makeover TV show, Hannah is sent to her New England hometown to renovate the historical Lewisburg Manor. Her old flame Jeff is assigned to make sure Hannah's design preserves the historical manor.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love. Stars Autumn Reeser.

programme.title: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs. Stars Amanda Schull and Peter Porte.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth gets the opportunity of showing her dog in a New York dog show. The judge, Donovan Darcy, comes across as aristocratic and rude, and a chain of misunderstandings unfold, complicating their attraction to one another.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Donovan are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: Prince Leopold, heir to the throne of Cordinia, falls in love with Emily Taylor, a humble seamstress from Philadelphia. But the young prince's wishes are challenged by his mother, who wants him to marry royalty.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former "Most Eligible Bachelor" how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: Helen, a shy florist, meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. So, she enlists the help of her best friend Henry to track him down only to find that her perfect man may already be right in front of her.

programme.title: Sweeter Than Chocolate
programme.desc: A local chocolatier is rumored to have the secret recipe to finding true love on February 14th, drawing in a TV reporter to investigate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Dan Jeannotte, Brenda Strong.

programme.title: The Real West
programme.desc: A family vacation to a working Ranch introduces Professor Rebecca to Jake West. Rebecca is a widow chasing tenure and Jake is a handsome cowboy who never settled down. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Lucas Bryant and James Denton.

programme.title: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: When author Cassie's first novel isn't selling, she is paired on a book tour with author Elliot to boost Cassie's sales - but along the way a romance starts to blossom. Stars Jen Lilley, Kevin McGarry, and Mary-Margaret Humes.

programme.title: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: Chelsea inherits a house in Vail. She meets Owen and gets a much needed break. Together, they put on Strudelfest to highlight the charm of Old Vail. Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. Stars Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, & Jack Turner.

programme.title: The Royal We
programme.desc: When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea who has lived her life away from her royal duties must now step in and honor the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince. Stars Mallory Jansen, Charlie Carrick.

programme.title: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A fiercely independent single woman is forced to consider marrying her not-so-perfect boyfriend when a gypsy fortuneteller convinces her she must be engaged by the spring or risk a lifetime alone.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age…and sometimes where you least expect it. Stars Rachel Boston and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Falling Together
programme.desc: Natalie tries to bring feuding neighbors together in her new condo building. Her unexpected ally is the building's super who prefers to avoid getting involved. Stars Ashley Williams, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Right in Front of Me
programme.desc: Carly has a second chance at romance with her college crush but is unable to impress him until her new friend Nick starts giving her advice. Soon she learns who the right man for her really is. Stars Janel Parrish, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Love on the Amazon
programme.desc: Claire travels to Brazil and hires Danny, a riverboat captain, to help her deliver an important message for her sister Amelia, a marine biologist studying pink dolphins on the Amazon River. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Rafael de la Fuente.

programme.title: Catch of the Day
programme.desc: On the eve of becoming a NY executive chef, Sophie returns home to help her family's flailing restaurant and runs into Cam, an old crush who makes her question everything. Stars Emilie Ullerup, Michael Rady, and Katie Lee Biegel.

programme.title: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: A Pinch of Portugal
programme.desc: When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. Stars Heather Hemmens, Luke Mitchell.

programme.title: Falling in Love in Niagara
programme.desc: After her fiancé leaves her before their wedding, MADELINE goes to Niagara Falls to honeymoon without him. There, she reconnects with her adventurous side, learns to let go, and finds new love. Stars Jocelyn Hudon, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they begin bonding in the kitchen.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Sparks are reignited when a single mother and a pro football player coincidentally meet again on her daughter's flag football field after his career is interrupted by a sports injury. Stars Pascale Hutton, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: My Norwegian Holiday
programme.desc: Dealing with her grandma's death, JJ seeks dissertation inspiration. Henrik, drawn to her troll figurine, invites her to Bergen, Norway, to trace its origins. Starring Rhiannon Fish and David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Christmas with the Singhs
programme.desc: Newly engaged Asha Singh and Jake O'Brien are excited to spend Christmas together, but their relationship is tested when their families' cultural and holiday traditions clash. Stars Anuja Joshi, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica sends Christmas cards to those special to her- the aunt who raised her, her brother, an aging popstar, the teacher that inspired her, and her friend that always tells the truth. Stars Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: The Search for Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett and judge Melissa Peterman kick off the hunt for Hallmark's next leading man as ten new hunks reinvent Santa, then brave a ski-slope meet-cute with Janel Parrish- where spills steal the scene.

programme.title: Unwrapping Christmas: Tina's Miracle
programme.desc: Successful gift-wrapping shop owner Tina is in charge of planning this year's annual Christmas gala. But things begin to go awry when the gala faces cancellation due to a scrooge-like estate owner. Stars Natalie Hall, Alec Santos.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Leah's 30th birthday is on Christmas Eve, the same day as her brother's wedding. Her childhood crush is back in town for the wedding and he is determined to make sure her birthday is celebrated. Stars Emily Osment, Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: When Anna offers a stranded mother and son shelter in a blizzard, she learns that they are the Royal Family of Galwick. Anna shows the Prince how they do Christmas in her hometown of Kentsbury. Stars Laura Osnes and Aaron Tveit.

programme.title: Time for Us to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Five guests are mysteriously invited to an inn to celebrate Christmas. With the help of the owner Ben, Sarah discovers that an event from the past may connect them and change their lives forever. Lacey Chabert, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Time for Him to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Four days before Christmas, Elizabeth receives a voicemail from a number she doesn't recognize. On the message, a man she doesn't know makes one final plea to the love of his life. Holland Roden, Tyler Hynes, Tenille Townes.

programme.title: Holiday Touchdown: A Bills Love Story (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Lifelong Bills fans Morgan and Gabe find love in Buffalo at Christmas. Holland Roden, Matthew Daddario, and Joe Pantoliano.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: With a residency at a top hospital and a boyfriend she adores, Lauren appears to have her entire life figured out. But when she loses both her job and her beau on the same day, Lauren reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's Maggie's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is trying to be devoted to son Jordan while having a career. Jordan meets Casey, a tutor. They bond. What he wishes most is for his mom to find happiness and love at Christmas. Stars Jill Wagner, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's Joyful Mrs. Miracle
programme.desc: Mrs. Miracle uses Christmas magic to reunite three siblings who must decide who will inherit the family's real estate empire following their grandmother's passing. Stars Rachel Boston, Pascal Lamothe-Kipnes, and Tanner Novlan.

programme.title: Miracle in Bethlehem, PA
programme.desc: A single woman with a newly adopted baby gets stuck in Bethlehem, PA. With no room at the Inn she's forced to stay with a stranger who turns out to be the miracle she needed. Starring Laura Vandervoort and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Melt My Heart This Christmas
programme.desc: Holly, a passionate glassblower, secretly displays her own art under a pseudonym while assisting a legendary glassblower to help Jack at a Christmas Fair. Starring Laura Vandervoort and Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: A Blue Ridge Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: Hotel manager Willow returns to her stunning Virginia hometown to help her sister plan a Christmas wedding at the inn her family once owned. She must work with current owner and single dad David, who wants to let go of the past.

programme.title: Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie find themselves in a murder mystery where secrets hidden within a treasured recipe book have dire consequences for all who own it. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Murder, with Love
programme.desc: Former prosecutor-turned-therapist Hailey Dean is acutely observant. During a tragic week, one of her patients loses her parents to fatal accidents. Stars Kellie Martin, Viv Leacock, Giacomo Baessato, Cindy Busby.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When Hailey helps her friend Pam sell her recently deceased parent's estate, she becomes suspicious when Pam suddenly leaves town without notice. To make matters worse, Pam's boyfriend is the sudden victim of an accident.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating is Murder
programme.desc: Attorney turned therapist Hailey Dean is pulled into another investigation when a popular new dating app links multiple missing persons cases from around the city. Stars Kellie Martin.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Site Unseen
programme.desc: A dedicated archaeologist gets involved in a murder investigation when she and her students unearth a dead body while searching for evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith and James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Past Malice
programme.desc: When Emma Fielding is recruited to aid in a groundbreaking discovery beneath the Chandler Castle, she is swept into another mystery when she finds her colleague murdered in the crypts. Stars Courtney Thorne Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: More Bitter than Death
programme.desc: After a friend and head of the National Archaeological Society meets an untimely death, Emma and Agent Conner find themselves questioning her colleagues' motives. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When consumer reporter, Ruby Herring stumbles onto a murder, the spunky redhead discovers a knack for crime solving. With the help of a handsome detective, Ruby finds a new career covering crime. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: Ruby and Detective Killian investigate a suspicious fatal car accident. With their yin and yang relationship, they solve the case, until Ruby finds new evidence that they may have it all wrong. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Prediction Murder
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow Pilot
programme.desc: Claire Darrow, a lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Joanna, Claire's estranged mother and a lawyer as well, would rather make a profit. They clash on nearly everything.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries: Recovered
programme.desc: Alex McPherson launches a podcast with a cold case from her past. With the help of local reporter, Drew Godfrey, new mysteries mix with old as the two work to recover what's been lost. Starring Alison Sweeney and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Newlywed and Dead
programme.desc: Photographer Allie Adams is shocked when the groom at a wedding she is covering is shot dead. What's even worse, is she must convince Detective Sam Acosta that her brother isn't the killer. Stars Alexa PenaVega, Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Photographer Allie and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death. Stars Alexa & Carlos PenaVega, Erik Estrada.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Exit Stage Death
programme.desc: Allie and Sam navigate the world of amateur theatrics as they pursue the killer of an actress. Their largest obstacle is trying to assess whether the cast members are lying or telling the truth. Starring Alexa & Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths
programme.desc: Fraternal twins Nikki and Nora are forced back into each other's lives when they inherit a detective agency. As they solve a murder, they realize their differences may be their greatest advantage. Stars Hunter King, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case. Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Det. Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father Nick is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum. Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.
